trivia_bullets.text: Modern Horizons 3 (released June 14, 2024) is a direct-to-Modern set. Energy is one of its primary mechanical themes, appearing across Boros, Izzet, and Azorius archetypes at common and uncommon.
sources: Draftsim: Modern Horizons 3 Spoilers and Set Information

trivia_bullets.text: Inventor's Axe costs {R} with Flash, enters attached, gives +2/+0, generates {E}{E} on entry, and equips for Pay {E}{E}. The ETB energy grant covers the first re-equip, making it effectively self-funding on a populated energy board.

Energy-cycle flag for Edgelord: Inventor's Axe shares the {E}{E}-on-entry ETB with Unstable Amulet (MH3 142) and both are red artifacts in the same set. Colossal Dreadmask (MH3 148) is a third equipment artifact in inventory from the same set. All three are potential members of an MH3 energy/artifact-weapons lair.
Pauper-legal common. EDHREC rank 15,696. Scryfall lists Energy Reserve (MH3) as a direct combo piece.

related_cards.name: Unstable Amulet
related_cards.note: Same set, same {E}{E}-on-entry pattern, same red artifact type; energy-lair co-member candidate

related_cards.name: Colossal Dreadmask
related_cards.note: Same set, equipment artifact; MH3 artifact-weapons cluster candidate

related_cards.name: Energy Reserve
related_cards.note: Scryfall-listed combo piece for Inventor's Axe

related_cards.name: Aether Revolt
related_cards.note: MH3 energy payoff that pings on energy-counter grants; natural pair

flags.edgelord_flag: Inventor's Axe + Unstable Amulet + Colossal Dreadmask form a 3-card MH3 energy/equipment artifact cluster in inventory -- flag for potential lair substrate evaluation
